steps.title: Use the built-in definition
steps.content: The dash clause immediately after the blank reads: “variations in size, shape, and material”. This is the definition of the missing word. The blank must mean something like “lack of uniformity” or “differences” among particles.

steps.title: Eliminate each wrong choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — incompatibilities: “Incompatibilities” means conflicts or inability to coexist, not mere variation in physical properties like size or shape. ✗
  • Choice B — restraints: “Restraints” means restrictions or limitations, which does not describe variations in size, shape, or material. ✗
  • Choice C — disruptions: “Disruptions” means disturbances or interruptions, not differences in physical characteristics among particles. ✗
  • Choice D — inconsistencies: “Inconsistencies” means lack of uniformity—a direct match for “variations in size, shape, and material”. ✓
That matches Choice D — inconsistencies.
